creator: brandon.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Hello!

I'm the author of iocage, and we recently did a rewrite. The ports have a couple issues:

1 - All 3 ports need to conflict with each other. They are not intended to be running at the same time.

2 - The sysutils/iocage port needs to be renamed to iocage_legacy, not simply point at that repo. We want it crystal clear the supported status. If that's not possible, removing the port is fine as well, it really doesn't have a future from us.

3 - sysutils/py-iocage is currently in /usr/local/bin. It should be in /usr/local/sbin as it is an administration tool, just as the current sysutils/iocage is located.


Thanks!

- Brandon
